Bread should be frozen to start.  Cut bread into even cubes/dice by spec.  Reserve in ziplock bags in the freezer
To Cook:
Take cubes of bread out of freezer and allow to come to room temp.
Toss with seasoning, then lay out on sheet tray in a single layer, not too close together.
In a preheated convcetion oven, ~350°F high fan, bake for ~10 minutes
5 minutes in, rotate sheet tray and shake croutons to ensure even baking.
Croutons should be crunchy, golden brown.
Reserve to appropriate containers and reserve for service.
